title: quercus ilex subsp. ballota
intro: Quercus ilex subsp. ballota, also known as Ballota holosericea or Spanish lavender, is a subspecies of Quercus ilex, a type of evergreen tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Quercus ilex subsp. ballota include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Quercus ilex subsp. ballota include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
